message:
🌱 vault: Vault Agent doesn't honor SIGHUP Signal (#1112)

* 🌱 Add vault: Vault Agent doesn't honor SIGHUP Signal mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🐛 Fix vault-8216 mission: update PR link from closed #17010 to merged #18638

PR #17010 was a proof of concept that was closed/not merged. The actual
implementation was PR #18638 (VAULT-9883: Agent Reloadable Config, merged
January 2023). Updated PR URL, step 3, and resolution summary.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "vault-8216-vault-agent-doesn-t-honor-sighup-signal",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "vault: Vault Agent doesn't honor SIGHUP Signal",
+    "description": "Vault Agent doesn't honor SIGHUP Signal. Requested by 20+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current vault setup",
+        "description": "Verify your vault version and configuration:\n```bash\nvault version\n```\nThis feature requires a working vault installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review vault configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant vault configuration:\nHi friends!  We've run into an interesting cert renewal problem with the Vault Agent. \n\nWe are using TLS certs+client cert in the Vault Agent to connect to our Vault Server."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Vault to get Agent reloadable configuration",
+        "description": "Vault Agent reloadable configuration support was implemented in PR #18638 (merged January 2023). This allows Vault Agent to reload its configuration on SIGHUP, including TLS certificates, without requiring a full restart.\n```bash\n# Upgrade to Vault 1.13+ which includes Agent reloadable config\nvault version\n# Send SIGHUP to the agent process to reload configuration\nkill -HUP $(pgrep -f \"vault agent\")\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Vault Agent doesn't honor SIGHUP Signal\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Vault Agent reloadable configuration was implemented in PR #18638 (VAULT-9883, merged January 2023). This allows the Agent to honor SIGHUP signals for reloading configuration, including TLS certificates and other settings, without requiring a full restart of the Agent process.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "% vault status\nKey             Value\n---             -----\nSeal Type       shamir\nInitialized     true\nSealed          false\nTotal Shares    5\nThreshold       3\nVersion         1.3.0\nCluster Name    vault-cluster-7545xxxx\nCluster ID      <hidden>\nHA Enabled      true\nHA Cluster      https://10.0.x.x:8201\nHA Mode         active"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },
